title: The Buzz Fly Catcher – 2 Pack (Super Effective, Refillable Insect Attractant) & STV334 JAW Fly Trap (Super Effective Disposable Insect Trap for Outdoor, Garden Use), Yellow, 20.0 cm*7.5 cm*7.5 cm
features: Packaging may vary due to a rolling brand change, the product remains the same
Twin pack of fly traps: outdoor fly traps with super-effective insect attractant included for each bottle; flies get in but can't get out
Outdoor use: Suitable for use in gardens, refuse areas and other outdoor spaces. Use to protect property and pet areas from fly invasions
Reusable insect traps: Refill bait available (STV337, sold separately). Two bait sachets are included to fill the traps
Just Add Water: leave the sachet of super effective bait attractant in the bottle and add the required amount of water to activate it – flies love it
Disposable fly trap: flies get in, but can't get out. Simply wait until the trap is full of flies and bin it with household refuse
Proven effective fly catcher: keeps working for over four weeks or until trap is full
description: From the manufacturer LOVE SUMMER: LIVE PEST-FREE Make the most of your summer with a wide range of decorative, discreet and poison-free products to help keep nuisance insect pests away. Keep gardens safe and enjoy camping, picnics, BBQs, festivals and parks with effective easy-to-use solutions to deter flying, biting and stinging insects. Poison-free control Products you can trust Experts in pest control for over 25 years Zero In Fly Max Re-Usable Fly Catcher Reusable fly trap with bait Attract, trap and kill flies in outdoor areas with the reusable Fly Catcher twin-pack from Zero In. Just mix water with the bait supplied and the super-effective attractant will attract flies within a 10 metre radius of the trap, providing proven results for up to 4 weeks. Hang or stand the trap in outdoor areas such as gardens, patios and refuse areas. Bait refill packs available (sold separately) for continued protection throughout the summer season. Flies get in and can't get out. Reusable traps – bait refill packs available (sold separately). Includes specially-formulated attractant - lures in flies within a 10 metre radius, creating a 300m² protected zone. Poison-free formula - ideal for gardens, patios and refuse areas. Lasts up to 4 weeks. Hang or stand. Product Highlights Kills Flies Again and Again Attract, trap and kill flies effectively in outdoor areas over and over again during the summer with reusable traps and bait refills (sold separately). 300m² Fly-Free Zone Specially-formulated for fast and effective control, the bait attractant will lure flies within a 10 metre radius providing a protected zone of over 300 square metres. 4-Week Protection Just add water and hang or stand the trap outside to provide up to 4 weeks protection from flies whilst you enjoy the summer sun. Bait refill packs available (sold separately). Poison-free Poison-free formula – ideal for gardens, patios and refuse areas. Eliminate flies without the need for poisons or nasty chemicals. Product Highlights Kills Flies Attract, trap and kill flies effectively in outdoor areas followed by clean and easy disposal – just fill it 'n bin it! 300m² Fly-Free Zone Specially-formulated for fast and effective control, the bait attractant will lure flies within a 10 metre radius providing a protected zone of over 300 square metres. 4-Week Protection Just add water and hang or stand the trap outside to provide up to 4 weeks protection from flies whilst you enjoy the summer sun. Poison-free Poison-free formula – ideal for gardens, patios and refuse areas. Eliminate flies without the need for poisons or nasty chemicals.
